context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent uses the intended alert-state convenience workflow instead of bypassing the tile's helper command.

checklist.name: uses alerts subcommand
checklist.description: Uses `python3 scripts/prom_query.py alerts --state pending` or an equivalent command from the bundled script.

checklist.name: states the generated promql
checklist.description: Explains that the generated PromQL expression is `ALERTS{alertstate="pending"}`.

checklist.name: describes wrapper behavior
checklist.description: Notes that the alerts helper is a convenience wrapper around the same Prometheus query endpoint.
